text.title: Jenkins Pipeline Patterns Decision Tree
text.summary: Routing tree mapping observable signals (pipeline count, library presence, parallelism need) to a rule from 01-core-rules.xml.

decision-tree.root-question: Top-level syntax in the existing Jenkinsfile?

conclusion.verdict: rewrite top-level as Declarative; move scripted into script{} with a justification comment

branch.when: style == declarative AND duplicated == true AND library_in_app_repo == true

conclusion.verdict: extract library to dedicated repo; vars/+src/+resources/+test/ layout; tag v1.0.0

branch.when: style == declarative AND duplicated == true AND library_in_app_repo == false AND pinned == false

conclusion.verdict: replace @main with semver tag; disable implicit loading

branch.when: style == declarative AND duplicated == true AND library_in_app_repo == false AND pinned == true AND parallel == true

conclusion.verdict: wrap each branch in dir() or ws(); lock() shared external resources

branch.when: style == declarative AND duplicated == true AND library_in_app_repo == false AND pinned == true AND parallel == false

conclusion.verdict: confirm options{} block has timeout + buildDiscarder + disableConcurrentBuilds + timestamps

branch.when: style == declarative AND duplicated == false AND agent == kubernetes

conclusion.verdict: enforce requests + limits on every container; privileged only on explicit dind

branch.when: style == declarative AND duplicated == false AND agent != kubernetes

conclusion.verdict: preconditions not met; route to correct methodology or skip.

text.example: style=top_level_scripted → rewrite as Declarative → extract dup logic to dedicated library → pin v1.0.0 → wrap parallel branches in dir() → enforces all 6 rules.
